display.name: Lava Flow
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A river of molten lava crawling slowly across the canvas, hot orange-red glowing through dark crust, bass triggering plumes of fire.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense particle system of custom-textured organic pods flows along a wave-like trajectory. A dramatic beat-gated event at ~0:05 triggers a camera dive and a burst of larger, textured elements toward the screen, driven by bass-attenuated thresholds. The rendering utilizes custom texture sampling combined with a dark background decay, creating a visceral, fiery landscape of organic embers.
